# Genesis Core Systems

> Genesis Core Systems is a modern core banking platform built for community banks, combining top-tier technology with affordability, flexibility, and dedicated support. Based in New York, NY.

Genesis Core Systems provides a unified, cloud-based, real-time core banking platform engineered specifically for small and medium-sized community banks. The platform offers modular plug-and-play architecture, API-driven integration, and a Design Partner Program that gives institutions privileged access to upcoming products.

## Pages

- [Home](https://genesiscoresystems.com/): Overview of the Genesis Core Systems core banking platform for community banks.
- [Solutions](https://genesiscoresystems.com/solutions.html): The platform — real-time processing, modular cloud architecture, and a marketplace of plug-and-play modules.
- [Services](https://genesiscoresystems.com/services.html): Consultation and implementation, support and maintenance, training and development, and bespoke services.
- [Partnership](https://genesiscoresystems.com/partnership.html): The Genesis Design Partner Program — limited-enrollment partnership for community banks.
- [About](https://genesiscoresystems.com/about.html): Who we are and our mission to bring Tier-1 banking technology within reach of community banks.
- [Articles](https://genesiscoresystems.com/articles.html): Insights and perspectives on core banking modernization and the future of community banking.
- [FAQ](https://genesiscoresystems.com/faq.html): Frequently asked questions about solutions, services, implementation, security, and the Design Partner Program.
- [Contact](https://genesiscoresystems.com/contact.html): Get in touch with the Genesis Core Systems team.

## Articles

- [Transforming Community Banking](https://genesiscoresystems.com/article-transforming-community-banking.html): How Genesis Core Systems is leading a technological revolution with affordable, scalable, flexible, and secure solutions.

## Policies

- [Privacy Policy](https://genesiscoresystems.com/privacy.html): How Genesis Core Systems collects, uses, discloses, and safeguards information.
- [Policies & Commitments](https://genesiscoresystems.com/policies.html): Code of Conduct, Supplier Code, Cookie Policy, ESG, DEI, Whistleblower, Modern Slavery, and Anti-Corruption policies.
